phase_name: aiGen button debug + affiliate URL feature pending

completed_tasks.name: Fix aiGenerateDescBrand brand detail page button

Push all fixes to dev + prod

Affiliate URL injection in social posts

blockers.description: aiGen button still not working despite fix — user ran typeof aiGen in console but paused before sharing result
blockers.workaround: Ask user for typeof aiGen result on resume

human_actions_pending.action: Share typeof aiGen console output ('function' or 'undefined')
human_actions_pending.context: Determines if script block parsed correctly. If 'undefined', the CSRF middleware may be corrupting the script tag. If 'function', the confirm() dialog is likely the issue since campaign description is pre-filled.

decisions.decision: aiGen rewritten as async/await with defensive null checks matching aiGenerateDesc pattern
decisions.rationale: Original had no null guard on querySelector — silent TypeError before any visible feedback. Also added confirm() dialog when description already has content.

next_action: Ask user: what did typeof aiGen return in the console? Then either fix script parse issue (if undefined) or explain confirm dialog behavior (if function). Then start affiliate URL feature as new /gsd:quick --discuss.
context_notes: Edit campaign page response is only 3432 bytes (suspicious — PIN page without session is 1992 bytes). aiGen fix deployed to both main and dev. New feature pending: affiliate URL replaces booking URL in FB captions (with UTM tracking token); IG caption changes 'Book now, link in bio' to 'Shop now, link in bio'. See composeFinalCaption.js and scheduler.js (enqueuePost) for relevant code paths.
